offer: For insurance brokers processing 5–15 claims/month, inefficient claim filing causes delayed resolutions. We simplify the claim process instead of manual tracking and filing through email and spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient claim filing and tracking processes lead to delayed resolutions for clients.
